features: Taking care of your whole mouth and smile is easy with Colgate Extra Clean Toothbrush
This toothbrush has been designed with a cleaning tip for a thorough clean, even of your back teeth
The manual toothbrush also has a tongue cleaner that gently removes odour causing bacteria for extra confidence
This toothbrush provides a full mouth clean by cleaning your teeth, tongue, cheeks and gums
The Colgate Extra Clean Toothbrush gives you superior bacteria removal vs an ordinary toothbrush without a tongue and cheek cleaner
COLOURS VARY: The toothbrush you receive may be a different colour from the one shown.
description: Product Description Value triple pack Extra clean means extra confidence. The Colgate Extra Clean Toothbrush has a special cleaning tip to reach and clean back teeth plus a soft rubber tongue cleaner to gently remove odour causing bacteria Ingredients Contains 3 Colgate Extra Clean Medium Toothbrushes (Assorted) Safety Warning Keep the product away from small children to avoid the risk of suffocation. Replace the brush every three months. Manufacturer Contact Information Colgate-Palmolive, Guildford, GU2 8JZ. See more
